---
# title: "Megan Zhao"
title: "Megan Zhao"
# imbeding image - professional headshot
image: media/wow-epic-shrew.jpg
toc: false
about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 18em
  # creating buttons
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:meganzhao.06@gmail.com
    - icon: linkedin 
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/meganzhao06/
      # open link in a new browser tab
      target: _blank
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://https://github.com/meandmymonky
      # open link in a new browser tab
      target: _blank
---
<p style = "font-size: 22px;"> Hello! My name is Megan. Currently, I am an undergraduate student at University of California, Santa Barbara, with a passion for exploring the intersection between scientific ecology and policy development. Feel free to explore this website, and learn a bit more [about me](https://meandmymonky.github.io/mzhao.github.io/about.html) and my work! </p>

---

# EDUCATION

{{< fa graduation-cap title= "graduation cap" >}} **BS in Environmental Studies, 2028**

*University of California, Santa Barbara*

{{< fa graduation-cap title= "graduation cap" >}} **BA in Geography: Geographic Information Science (GIS), 2028**

*University of California, Santa Barbara*

{{< fa graduation-cap title= "graduation cap" >}} **BA in Philosophy: Ethics and Public Policy, 2028**

*University of California, Santa Barbara*
